description: A mechanic uses a part (e.g., a filter) for a repair. The inventory system must be updated, and the part reordered if stock is low.

nodes.task_description: A mechanic scans the barcode of a part as they use it on a repair order.

expected_outcome.value: The part is added to the repair order, and inventory is deducted.

nodes.task_description: The system checks the new on-hand quantity for the part against its reorder point.

expected_outcome.value: The system sees the quantity has fallen below the reorder point.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically generates a purchase order for the part from the designated supplier.

expected_outcome.value: A PO is created to replenish the stock.
